title: rhamnus alnifolia
intro: Rhamnus alnifolia, also known as buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Rhamnus alnifolia include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of buckthorn include extracts, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support liver health, alleviate constipation, and promote overall well-being.
